# awscc_securityagent_security_requirement_pack (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::SecurityAgent::SecurityRequirementPack



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the pack
- `kms_key_id` (String) KMS key for client-side encryption of pack contents
- `name` (String) Name of the security requirement pack
- `pack_id` (String) Unique identifier of the security requirement pack
- `security_requirements` (Attributes List) Security requirements within this pack (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_requirements))
- `status` (String) Whether the pack is enabled or disabled
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags for the security requirement pack (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--security_requirements"></a>
### Nested Schema for `security_requirements`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description of the security requirement
- `domain` (String) Security domain this requirement belongs to
- `evaluation` (String) How to evaluate compliance with this requirement
- `name` (String) Name of the security requirement
- `remediation` (String) How to remediate non-compliance


<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The key name of the tag
- `value` (String) The value for the tag
